evidenceSnippetOriginal: Do not upload third-party content you are not permitted to share. Ensure that any reuse of AI outputs complies with licensing and academic citation norms. When communicating externally, do not present dAIsy outputs as Imperial's position without approval.
evidenceLocator: dAIsy Use Policy Sections 11 (Copyright and IP) and 12 (Communications and transparency)
